final:
module sata_decoder(input [4:0] command, output reg [2:0] obf_category);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (command)  
            5'b00000: obf_category = 3'b000; // NOP  
            5'b00001, 5'b00010: obf_category = 3'b001; // Read commands  
            5'b00011, 5'b00100: obf_category = 3'b010; // Write commands  
            5'b00101: obf_category = 3'b011; // Identify Device  
            default: obf_category = 3'b100; // Reserved commands  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
